cross_domain_bonus_rationale: All 11 hypotheses bridge statistical mechanics / non-equilibrium physics to protein biochemistry / amyloid disease: genuine 2+ disciplinary boundary crossing confirmed by zero cross-field citations between the Mpemba literature and amyloid MSM literature.

hypotheses_scored.title: Rough Energy Landscape Diffusion Asymmetry Creates the Spectral Signature That the Mpemba Index Detects (Sharpened Falsification)
hypotheses_scored.diversity_action: DROPPED — >80% mechanistic overlap with E6-H1xH5. E1-H5 subsumed as Level 1 of E6 three-level causal chain. Excluded from evolution selection despite rank-1 linear score.

hypotheses_scored.title: Hierarchical Spectral Scoring: Zwanzig Roughness Predicts Bimodality, Bimodality Enables Mpemba Index, Mpemba Index Predicts Aggregation Propensity
hypotheses_scored.diversity_action: RETAINED as representative of the roughness-bimodality-Mpemba family. Subsumes E1-H5 as Level 1.

hypotheses_scored.title: Mpemba Index of Protein Folding MSMs Predicts Amyloid Aggregation Propensity (Citations Corrected)
hypotheses_scored.diversity_action: RETAINED — aggregation propensity classification distinct from E6 framework level and from E3 polymorph prediction.

hypotheses_scored.title: Cooling-Rate-Dependent Fibril Polymorph Selection in Tractable Amyloid Systems Is Predicted by Eigenmode Branching from Rough Landscape Asymmetry
hypotheses_scored.diversity_action: RETAINED — polymorph selection via T_cross crossover is distinct from aggregation classification and fibril suppression.

hypotheses_scored.title: Inverse Mpemba Cooling Protocol Suppresses Amyloid Fibril Formation in Systems with Genuine Non-Monotonic Nucleation Temperature Dependence
hypotheses_scored.diversity_action: RETAINED — fibril suppression via cooling protocol is mechanistically distinct from all other selected hypotheses.
hypotheses_scored.elo_note: Wins ALL 5 pairwise matches. HIGHEST Elo rank despite rank-5 linear composite. Recommended as FIRST experimental test (2-3 months, ThT assay, no specialized equipment).

hypotheses_scored.title: Non-Equilibrium Maximum-Likelihood MSMs Reveal Non-Normal Transient Dynamics in Amyloidogenic Proteins under Cellular Driving
hypotheses_scored.diversity_action: PROMOTED to Top 5 from rank 6 to replace E1-H5 (dropped for overlap). Maximum diversity value: non-equilibrium cellular context absent from all other selected hypotheses.
hypotheses_scored.elo_note: LOWEST Elo rank (0/5 wins). Highest technical complexity. Test last despite strong diversity value.

hypotheses_scored.title: A* State Population Is the Protein Mpemba Overlap Coefficient — A Quantitative Unification
Measured D_misfold/D_fold Ratio of PrP Predicts Bimodal Eigenvalue Spectrum via Zwanzig-Kramers Bridge
Resource-Theoretic Mpemba Monotone Predicts Therapeutic Window for Aggregation Reversal
hypotheses_scored.note: Highest cross-field distance (9/10) in session. Resource theory x protein biochemistry is the most creative bridge. Worthy of future independent development despite therapeutic claim removal.

hypotheses_scored.title: Maximum-Likelihood Non-Reversible MSMs Reveal Non-Normal Dynamics in Amyloidogenic Proteins
hypotheses_scored.note: E4-H3 (rank 6) is the superior non-equilibrium reformulation addressing the trivial-non-normality objection.

hypotheses_scored.title: Cooling-Rate-Dependent Fibril Polymorph Selection in Abeta42 via Eigenmode Branching
hypotheses_scored.note: E3-H7xH5 (rank 3) is the superior version with insulin replacing Abeta42 IDP and T_cross discriminant added.

summary.diversity_action: E1-H5 dropped for >80% overlap with E6-H1xH5; E4-H3 promoted from rank 6
summary.elo_top: E5-H4 (5/5 wins) — FIRST to test experimentally
summary.key_finding: All 6 cycle-1 evolved hypotheses outrank all 5 cycle-2 survivors. Iterated evolution > new generation for this target.
summary.elo_linear_divergence: E5-H4 wins Elo (rank 1 pairwise) but ranks 5th linearly. Divergence reflects proximal testability gradient compressed in 1-10 Testability scale.
recommended_test_sequence: E5-H4 (first, 2-3 months, ThT assay, basic equipment)
E3-H7xH5 (after E5, 6-9 months, insulin structural biology)

diversity_check.redundant_pair: E1-H5 and E6-H1xH5 (>80% overlap: E6 synthesizes E1 as Level 1 of its 3-level causal chain)
diversity_check.action: Dropped E1-H5 from evolution selection; promoted E4-H3

elo_tournament.divergence_explanation: Pairwise comparisons implicitly up-weight proximal testability beyond what the 1-10 Testability score captures. E5-H4 needs only spectrofluorometer + insulin + pH 2 buffer (2-3 months). All other hypotheses need MSM construction or specialized equipment. Run E5-H4 as fast feedback loop while building MSM infrastructure for E6/E2.
